name: Mayakashi Metamorphosis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>変</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Discard 1 card, then target 1 of your "Mayakashi" monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it. Your opponent cannot target it with card effects this turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this card, except "Mayakashi" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Mayakashi Metamorphosis" per turn.
eff: Discard 1 card, then target 1 of your "Mayakashi" monsters that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon it. Your opponent cannot target it with card effects this turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this card, except "Mayakashi" monsters. You can only activate 1 "Mayakashi Metamorphosis" per turn.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
